demos.title: Screenshot Paste — Centering a Placeholder

key_frames.caption: Running npm run dev and viewing the app at localhost:3000
Taking screenshot of placeholder text on left panel
Pasting screenshot with Ctrl+V into Claude Code
Placeholder successfully centered after Claude's fix

walkthrough_steps: Instructor starts dev server with `npm run dev`, opens app at localhost:3000
Wants to move placeholder text to center of left panel
Takes screenshot of the target area
Pastes into Claude Code using Ctrl+V (not Cmd+V on macOS)
Asks Claude to center the placeholder
Claude searches codebase, makes styling update
Result: placeholder is now centered — looks great

demos.title: Plan Mode + Thinking — Replacing Technical Tool Names with User-Friendly Text

key_frames.caption: String Replace Editor — technical tool name shown to users
Taking screenshot of the technical text for Claude
Enabling Plan Mode with Shift+Tab twice
Thinking trigger phrases — think, think more, ultrathink
Combining plan mode and ultrathink for complex task
Feature complete — 'Creating file' and 'Editing file' shown instead
Follow-up edit shows 'Editing app.jsx' — feature works

walkthrough_steps: Instructor generates a card component — notices 'String Replace Editor' in chat UI
This technical tool name should show user-friendly text like 'Creating file: ...'
Takes screenshot and pastes into Claude Code
Enables Plan Mode (Shift+Tab twice) — Claude will do more research and create detailed plan
Explains Plan Mode: Claude reads more files, creates plan, waits for approval before implementing
Enables Thinking with 'ultrathink' — gives Claude maximum reasoning budget
Explains when to use each: Planning = breadth (multi-file), Thinking = depth (complex logic)
Both can be combined; both consume additional tokens (cost consideration)
After a couple minutes, feature is complete
Tests: 'Creating file' shows for new components, 'Editing app.jsx' shows for edits
Instructor mentions Claude Code is also a solid Git assistant for staging and committing changes
